title: daucus prutenicus
intro: Daucus prutenicus, also known as Prutensky carrot, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Daucus prutenicus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall gut health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues. Daucus prutenicus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is often combined with other herbs to create a holistic approach to digestive health.
